blurb: BBC Research & Development, the BBC's technology research arm, including work on responsible AI, content provenance and trusted public-service media.

hiring.note: Official BBC SuccessFactors RSS feed checked for AI + London; added Lead Project Manager - Gen AI in Strategy and Transformation. Rejected generic production/commercial RSS matches.

publications.title: AI that the public can trust
publications.summary: BBC R&D argues trust, provenance and accountability must be built into AI-mediated media, framed around its '5Is' vision and the Responsible Innovation Centre.

publications.title: Building a public interest approach to AI in the news
publications.summary: BBC R&D's Responsible Innovation Centre sets out a five-area research agenda for AI and journalism, from evaluation to reaching young audiences.

publications.title: Increasing trust in content: Media provenance and Project Origin
publications.summary: BBC R&D explains media provenance techniques (watermarks, fingerprints, C2PA-hashed metadata) and Project Origin work to help audiences assess content authenticity.

notes: BBC R&D site (bbc.co.uk/rd) is fully JS-rendered; no sitemap/RSS and curl returns no article links. Used web_search to find articles, then verified each by fetching the page. Pub dates: 2026-03 from URL slug + 'March 20, 2026' search date; 2025-10-17 and the 2023-10 piece confirmed via on-page 'Published' text/URL. No controversies where BBC R&D is a named legal party. role_harvest 2026-07-02: official BBC SuccessFactors RSS query for AI + London verified Lead Project Manager - Gen AI; role description ties it to the BBC Generative AI Team and responsible public-service AI delivery.
